raw_resume_text:
LATASHA MARIE TILLMAN
134 Sandy Ln Walled Lake, MI 48390 | 313-318-6834 | latashamotion21@yahoo.com

SUMMARY
Results-driven logistics and supply chain professional with 16+ years of experience leading cross-functional projects across automotive, manufacturing, and retail environments. Proven ability to manage end-to-end initiatives involving forecasting, inventory optimization, vendor management, system integration (SAP/EDI), and process improvement. Recognized for driving operational efficiency, stakeholder alignment, and on-time project delivery across multi-site operations.

WORK EXPERIENCE
Infineon Technologies | Customer Logistics Manager | Sep 2021 – Oct 2025
Led end-to-end logistics programs for major automotive semiconductor clients managing forecasting, order fulfillment, and consignment VMI inventory. Acted as project lead for cross-functional initiatives across IT, Finance, Sales, and external partners to improve SAP and EDI data alignment. Managed inventory optimization projects reducing aged and obsolete stock. Developed logistics KPIs and served as primary stakeholder liaison.

Brasscraft Manufacturing | Logistics Analyst | Mar 2019 – Sep 2021
Led logistics improvement projects focused on transportation efficiency, cost visibility, and network optimization. Designed KPI dashboards supporting data-driven decisions. Coordinated annual logistics summits and cross-functional initiatives. Managed 3PL performance reviews and corrective action plans. Supported distribution center operations and timeline tracking.

XPO Logistics | Operations Manager / Last Mile Account Manager | Sep 2018 – Jan 2019
Oversaw daily operations for high-volume last-mile delivery accounts ensuring on-time performance and customer satisfaction. Managed contract compliance, performance metrics, and issue resolution. Partnered with warehouse and routing teams to improve load planning and claims reduction.

Ryder Logistics (Promotion) | Sr. Project Analyst / Kaizen Coordinator | Apr 2016 – Feb 2018
Led internal process improvement projects through Ryder's Ideation Program. Facilitated project lifecycles from concept to implementation. Coordinated cross-functional teams ensuring on-time and in-scope delivery. Developed project metrics, reporting, and ROI analysis. Supported continuous improvement culture through Kaizen events.

Ryder Logistics (Promotion) | Carrier Management | Dec 2014 – Apr 2016
Managed premium carrier performance for major OEM clients. Led carrier compliance and KPI-driven performance initiatives. Supported EDI troubleshooting and GPS integration projects.

Ryder Logistics | Earlier Roles (Promotion) | May 2009 – Dec 2014
Supported large-scale logistics operations for major enterprise clients. Led high-volume shipping operations and staff training initiatives. Standardized workflows and implemented Lean process improvements.

EDUCATION
University of Phoenix | Master of Arts, Education (Adult Education & Training) | Jun 2011
University of Phoenix | Bachelor of Science, Business (Marketing) | Jun 2008

TECHNICAL
SAP, EDI, MS Office Suite, Tableau, Access, Inventory Management Systems

SKILLS
Vendor Management, Internal Auditing, Project Management, New Business Launches, Process Improvement
